mapper.select: SELECT r.*, s.real_name as staff_name FROM staff_relative r LEFT JOIN retired_staff s ON r.staff_id = s.staff_id WHERE r.staff_id = #{staffId} ORDER BY r.relative_id
SELECT r.*, s.real_name as staff_name FROM staff_relative r LEFT JOIN retired_staff s ON r.staff_id = s.staff_id ORDER BY r.staff_id, r.relative_id
SELECT r.*, s.real_name as staff_name FROM staff_relative r LEFT JOIN retired_staff s ON r.staff_id = s.staff_id WHERE r.relative_id = #{relativeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff_relative (staff_id, relation_type, name, address, living_area, phone, email, workplace, qq_wechat) VALUES (#{staffId}, #{relationType}, #{name}, #{address}, #{livingArea}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{workplace}, #{qqWechat})
